ops.body: Re-closing: T1 (LOCAL_PEERTOKEN query-time TOCTOU) documented in wire/peer_darwin.go + trust/policy.go godoc per the accept-and-document decision; XPC alternative tracked as db24393. T2 injection gate (CS_RUNTIME required, GET_TASK_ALLOW/DEBUGGED rejected, injection entitlements scanned) implemented in trust/verify_darwin.go and PROVEN by signed-fixture E2E: 6 fixtures signed with the real Developer ID identity (SXKCTF23Q2), all 7 gated tests green plain + -race via scripts/test.sh. Key point: nolv/gta/unhardened fixtures carry VALID Developer ID signatures yet are rejected — the hardening gate itself is exercised, not the anchor. Committed f4cd5e1805a1, CI green https://github.com/yasyf/daemonkit/actions/runs/29625574333. Known gap for later: no cross-team-ID reject fixture exists (all fixtures same team); identifier-mismatch same-team rejection is covered.
